name: Humongous Hive Hegemon - Zexstagger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>甲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>虫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>体</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゼクスタッガー
desc: Gains 300 ATK for each Insect monster on the field, except this card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Humongous Hive Hegemon - Zexstagger" once per turn. If an Insect monster(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the End Phase: Activate this effect; each player can Special Summon 1 Insect monster from their hand or GY, but negate its effects.
mnst_eff: Gains 300 ATK for each Insect monster on the field, except this card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Humongous Hive Hegemon - Zexstagger" once per turn. If an Insect monster(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the End Phase: Activate this effect; each player can Special Summon 1 Insect monster from their hand or GY, but negate its effects.
eff: Gains 300 ATK for each Insect monster on the field, except this card. You can only use each of the following effects of "Humongous Hive Hegemon - Zexstagger" once per turn. If an Insect monster(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the End Phase: Activate this effect; each player can Special Summon 1 Insect monster from their hand or GY, but negate its effects.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your opponent's hand to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
